en: The antonym of wide is narrow.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua wide la narrow.

en: The antonym of true is false.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua true la false.

en: The antonym of always is never.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua always la never.

en: The antonym of quick is slow.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua quick la slow.

en: The antonym of earn is spend.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua earn la spend.

en: The antonym of create is destroy.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua create la destroy.

en: The antonym of laugh is cry.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua laugh la cry.

en: The antonym of freeze is melt.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua freeze la melt.

en: The antonym of neat is untidy.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua neat la untidy.

en: The antonym of busy is idle.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua busy la idle.

en: The antonym of humble is proud.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua humble la proud.

en: The antonym of loud is soft.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua loud la soft.

en: The antonym of back is front.
vi: Tu trai nghia cua back la front.
